title: Spring Chef - Mint Small Cookie Scoop for Baking, Multifunctional #60 Melon Baller with Trigger Release for Watermelon, Ice Cream, Protein Ball, Stainless Steel Scooper, 1 Tbsp Cookie Dough Scoop
features: Helps You Bake Uniform-Sized Cookies - The small size 1 tablespoon cookie scoop is size #60, yields a 2 inch cookie. This cookie baller scoop scoops batter into several pieces of equal shape and sizes. It has a wiper that cleanly removes sticky dough with just a swipe. So, you can make as many batches of cookies as you want without hassle.

Easy to Use - Using this cookie scooper for baking allows you to scoop effortlessly. It releases your cookie dough with a simple squeeze of the trigger, so you can make “store-bought-quality” cookies right at home. The mini cookie scoop is Dishwasher Safe making cleanup a breeze.

Single Metal Piece for Scoop Head - Our Grade 304 18/8 Stainless Steel small cookie scoop for baking stands out due to its superior quality and workmanship with a single metal piece construction for the bowl. Others have a weak scoop head made of two pieces that are welded together and can let dough get stuck in the gap.
Comes with Ergonomic Handles - No more awkward scooping and painful wrists! Our scoop comes with soft, comfortable handles for easy scooping. So, you can maintain a good grip every time.

Versatile Batter Scoop - This kitchen tool does more than scoop cookie dough. You can use it as cupcake scoop, protein balls scoop, meatballs scoop, melon baller scoop, ice cream scoop, sorbet scoop, muffin scoop, cake pop scoop and so much more!
description: International products have separate terms, are sold from abroad and may differ from local products, including fit, age ratings, and language of product, labeling or instructions.
